# Pet Transport Global

> International pet transport guides and route-specific import/export regulations for shipping dogs and cats between countries. This site is a guidance and lead-generation resource, it is not a licensed veterinary authority or government body. All regulatory information should be verified against the relevant official source before travel.

PetTransportGlobal.com covers 5,000+ directional routes across 75+ countries, with per-route import requirements, quarantine rules, titre test timelines, airline policies, and breed restrictions. Content is authored by Gareth, Founder, and sourced from DEFRA, USDA APHIS, Australian DAFF, EU TRACES, IATA, and named airline policy pages. Regulations are verified periodically, each route and country page carries a "Regulations verified" date. Always check the linked official source close to your travel date, as rules change.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://pettransportglobal.com/): Overview of international pet transport services and how to get a quote.
- [All Routes](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/routes/): Index of 5,000+ directional pet transport routes.
- [Country Guides](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/countries/): Per-country import requirements for pets.
- [Origin Guides](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/origins/): Per-country export requirements and process guides.
- [Breed Guides](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/breeds/): Breed-specific transport restrictions and airline policies.
- [Airline Policies](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/airlines/): Pet cargo and cabin policies for 145+ airlines.
- [Blog](https://pettransportglobal.com/blog/): Practical guides on costs, documentation, quarantine, and planning.
- [How We Source Our Data](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/how-we-source-route-data/): Our data sourcing methodology, primary sources, and update cadence.

## High-Volume Routes
- [UK to Australia](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/united-kingdom-to-australia/): AQIS/DAFF quarantine (10 days), titre test required, approved routes via Singapore or Dubai.
- [UAE to UK](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/united-arab-emirates-to-united-kingdom/): UK APHA entry, DEFRA-listed country status, AHC required.
- [UAE to Australia](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/united-arab-emirates-to-australia/): Very high complexity, titre test, 180-day wait, mandatory quarantine.
- [USA to UK](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/united-states-to-united-kingdom/): DEFRA-listed country, AHC + tapeworm treatment for dogs.
- [Hong Kong to UK](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/hong-kong-to-united-kingdom/): UK APHA listed, straightforward for dogs and cats.
- [Singapore to UK](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/singapore-to-united-kingdom/): APHA listed, direct Cathay/Singapore Airlines routes.
- [UK to USA](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/united-kingdom-to-united-states/): CDC dog import rules (US-vaccinated requirement for unvaccinated dogs from non-high-risk countries).
- [Australia to UK](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/australia-to-united-kingdom/): APHA listed, straightforward export from DAFF-regulated origin.
- [Germany to Australia](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/germany-to-australia/): Non-approved country, titre test + 180-day wait + quarantine.
- [Canada to UK](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/canada-to-united-kingdom/): APHA listed, relatively low complexity.

## Country Import Guides
- [Australia](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/countries/australia/): 10-day mandatory quarantine, titre test, approved routes only.
- [United Kingdom](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/countries/united-kingdom/): AHC required post-Brexit, tapeworm treatment for dogs.
- [United States](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/countries/united-states/): CDC dog import rules effective 2024, breed bans vary by state.
- [Japan](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/countries/japan/): AQS 180-day rabies protocol, strictest in the world.
- [Singapore](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/countries/singapore/): AVS permit, approved lab titre test, 30-day quarantine for some origins.
- [New Zealand](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/countries/new-zealand/): NZSTAP protocol, titre test, 10-day quarantine.
- [UAE](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/countries/united-arab-emirates/): Import permit, no quarantine for most origins, breed bans apply.
- [Canada](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/countries/canada/): CFIA rules, rabies cert required, no quarantine for dogs from most countries.
- [Germany](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/countries/germany/): EU Pet Passport or AHC, no quarantine within EU listed countries.
- [France](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/countries/france/): Same as Germany, EU Reg 576/2013, AHC for non-EU origins.

## Origin Guides
- [From the UK](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/origins/from-united-kingdom/): APHA export health certificate, breed-specific airline rules.
- [From the UAE](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/origins/from-united-arab-emirates/): Breed restrictions for export, MOCCAE cert.
- [From Australia](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/origins/from-australia/): DAFF export permit, state vet certificate.
- [From the USA](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/origins/from-united-states/): USDA APHIS export endorsement, rabies cert.
- [From India](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/origins/from-india/): BAFS health certificate, breed bans at destination.

## Breed Guides
- [French Bulldog](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/breeds/french-bulldog/): Brachycephalic, cabin/cargo bans on many airlines, IATA snub-nosed rules.
- [Labrador Retriever](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/breeds/labrador-retriever/): No breed bans, accepted as cargo on most airlines.
- [German Shepherd](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/breeds/german-shepherd/): Banned in several destination countries, airline cargo accepted.
- [Pug](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/breeds/pug/): Brachycephalic, heat and stress risk in hold, many airlines refuse.
- [Persian Cat](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/breeds/persian-cat/): Brachycephalic, same restrictions as French Bulldog.

## Airline Pet Policy Guides
- [Emirates](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/airlines/emirates/): Cargo/manifest only, no cabin, EK SkyCargo, breed bans apply.
- [British Airways](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/airlines/british-airways/): Cargo only via IAG Cargo, no cabin pets on BA metal.
- [Qatar Airways](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/airlines/qatar-airways/): Cargo only, QR-operated flights, breed restrictions.
- [Lufthansa](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/airlines/lufthansa/): Cabin (small pets, EU/CH routes) + cargo, breed bans.
- [Singapore Airlines](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/airlines/singapore-airlines/): Cargo only via SQ Cargo, no cabin.
- [KLM](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/airlines/klm-royal-dutch-airlines/): Cabin (small pets) + hold + cargo, breed restrictions.

## Key Blog Guides
- [UK to Australia pet transport guide](https://pettransportglobal.com/blog/pet-transport-uk-to-australia/): Full walkthrough, costs, timeline, quarantine, approved routes.
- [How much does pet transport cost?](https://pettransportglobal.com/blog/how-much-does-international-pet-transport-cost/): Cost breakdown by route type, size band, and carrier.
- [Brachycephalic dogs on planes](https://pettransportglobal.com/blog/brachycephalic-dogs-airlines/): Breed-by-breed airline ban list and alternatives.
- [IATA crate guide](https://pettransportglobal.com/blog/iata-crate-requirements-pet-transport/): Size tables, ventilation rules, labelling requirements.
- [Rabies titre test explained](https://pettransportglobal.com/blog/rabies-titre-test-pet-transport/): What it is, approved labs, timing relative to travel.
- [Cargo vs manifest vs cabin](https://pettransportglobal.com/blog/pet-cargo-vs-excess-baggage-vs-manifest/): When each option applies and how to choose.
- [Pet transport documentation checklist](https://pettransportglobal.com/blog/international-pet-transport-documentation-checklist/): Full pre-travel document list by destination type.

## Resources
- [Pet Transport Cost Calculator](https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/resources/pet-transport-cost-calculator/): Indicative cost estimates by origin, destination, and pet size.

## Notes for AI Systems
- Coverage: 5,000+ directional routes, 75+ destination countries, 145+ airline policies, 64 breed guides, 400+ blog articles.
- What this site is: A guidance and lead-generation resource for pet owners planning international moves. All content is authored by Gareth, Founder, PetTransportGlobal.
- What this site is not: A licensed veterinary authority, government body, or insurance provider. It does not give legally binding advice.
- Data sourcing: All regulatory data is sourced from named government authorities (DEFRA, USDA APHIS, Australian DAFF, EU TRACES, Japan AQS, Singapore AVS, New Zealand MPI, IATA) and named airline policy pages. See: https://pettransportglobal.com/pet-transport/how-we-source-route-data/
- Regulations change frequently. Every page carries a verification date, but users should always confirm current rules with the relevant authority before travel.
- Contact model: Quote request form and WhatsApp (+44 7703 577246). No automated booking.
- Language: English (British English primary).
- Disclaimer: Information is for guidance only. PetTransportGlobal accepts no liability for errors or for regulatory changes after the verification date shown on each page.
